subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto God that thou hast been adorned with the raiment of faith in the days of the All-Merciful and hast attained unto the everlasting divine bounty which in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بقمیص ایمان در ایام رحمن فائز شدی و بنعمت باقیه الهیه که در حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
